name: no-spoiler-cricket
description: Spoiler-safe cricket fixtures and watch guide — paper/ink UCI-Roadbook-style index of the 2026 season.

scripts.build: node generate-page.js && node generate-series.js && node generate-match-sheet.js && node generate-teams.js && node generate-players-index.js && node generate-player-details.js --all && node generate-directory-indexes.js && node generate-redirects.js

author: Rob Gruhl
